programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The former dictator of a Caribbean island is made to have hallucinatory visions in which he sees his ominous destiny as part of an ingenious plot designed by the Impossible Missions Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Before a statute of limitations expires on a 10-million dollar robbery, the Impossible Missions Force must spring the suspect from prison and dupe him into leading police to the hiding place of the money.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon is captured and the enemy discovers the one thing that would unmask her identity and expose the Impossible Mission Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is pitted against the ingenious logic of an enemy agent (guest Steve Ihnat) as the IMF attempts to lead the agent through a maze of complicated clues in order to reach a false conclusion.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force must end the murderous career of a bacteriologist working for the enemy, who has succeeded in developing a mutant strain of a deadly bacteria which could be used as a practical battlefield weapon.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) sets out to persuade the trusted henchman of a crime syndicate leader to testify against his boss.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An electronically guarded prison confronts the Impossible Missions Force when it tries to free a political prisoner (Richard Garland) from an escape-proof glass cell.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: When an unscrupulous manufacturer risks World War III by offering a hydrogen bomb for sale, the Impossible Missions Force enters the bidding with a dangerous plan to keep the weapon out of enemy hands.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a grocery store. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, neighbors grapple with the dilemma of whether to replace their old pipes with new ones or build a swimming pool.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, a new flying trolley comes with a message that Collette, Grandpere's granddaughter, will be coming for a visit.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows pictures of his own parents and visits Negri's Music Shop where jazz violinist John Blake and his son play music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about hobbies like reading. Collette says her hobby is taking pictures of jungle animals. Daniel questions if he has grandparents. Neighbor Aber assures him that he does.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays a recording of grandparents. He visits an aquarium. Lady Aberlin will be a trolley engineer in the Neighborhood opera. Daniel is given the part of the one who wants a granddad.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: A whimsical musical story about timid Daniel Tiger who is in search of his long-lost grandfather. There's an aquarium with starfish, an old goat and a Trolley Conductor, all helping each other realize how important families are.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits an applesauce factory. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, X is waiting for his seeds to arrive. He plants the seeds, but they don't grow. He plays hide-and-seek while waiting. Mister Rogers talks about waiting.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers makes granola bags and talks about people without enough to eat. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Queen Sara discusses her Food for the World hunger project. Old Goat eats the plants. Mister Rogers talks about sharing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about how some foods are better than others. Chef Brockett makes a tasty snack. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday discovers Old Goat eating from his garden. The King plants seeds everywhere.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a picture book of vegetables and tours a vegetable soup factory. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, seeds are growing to send food to Northwood. Daniel thinks he has a tree that grows cans of vegetable soup.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers tells viewers that there are many different kinds of food. Food for the eyes, for the ears, and for the spirit.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a portrait of his father and has his portrait painted. He says no two people are exactly alike. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday gets an "exactly-like-me" portrait. It is a mirror.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers remembers that his parents sometimes had to say "no" to keep him safe. Then, King Friday says "yes" to officiating a wedding.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Germaine Vaughan shows Mister Rogers how to break dance. Chrissie Thompson, who is handicapped, visits. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Ana Platypus wants to be in the wedding but can't. Daniel is having trouble being the ring bearer.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows photographs of weddings. He goes to Brockett's Bakery to make arroz con leche. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, everyone is preparing for a wedding. Daniel is nervous about his role as ring bearer and his costume.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a pottery studio to see how Eva Kwong makes a bowl. Later, Mister Rogers talks about weddings. Betty Okonak Templeton Jones marries James Michael Jones in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: While planting a seed, Mister Rogers talks about how long it takes for plants to grow and that learning to wait is important. He also shows a video about how people make orange juice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of a bird family, and an origami artist demonstrates how to make paper birds and puppets. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, a puppet couple, Betty and James, adopt a baby daughter.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nobles from around the world gather for the Reverie as the echoes of the Paramount War resound! Among them are Shirahoshi and her family from the Ryugu Kingdom under the sea. Meanwhile, Admiral Fujitora has a conversation with his new colleague.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Stelly, Sabo's adopted brother and now the king of the Goa Kingdom, walks up to Garp who is escorting the royal family of the Fish-Man Island, with an air of importance and something up his sleeve.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shirahoshi and her family finally reach the Holyland of Mariejois! But all the unexpected attention confuses her. Meanwhile, Vivi from Alabasta meets Leo and Rebecca from Dressrosa, and tells them the story of her journey with the Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Vivi reunites with Dalton and Dr. Kureha from the Sakura Kingdom and they share their memories of the Straw Hats with Shirahoshi and Rebecca. Meanwhile, a shadowy figure descends a long staircase at the castle in the Holyland and opens a mysterious door.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Shirahoshi crosses the fancy of a Celestial Dragon, and those living gods are not open to having their whims disobeyed! As she is dragged away, King Neptune comes to her rescue, risking life and limb by defying the Celestial Dragon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Emperors of the Sea, Big Mom and Kaido decide to team up against Luffy! Meanwhile, Garp hears about the wild exploits of his grandson, all while a mysterious outsider visits the highest authority in the world!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After sneaking into the Land of the Gods, Sabo sees the shocking figure of his friend – Kuma! Abused by the World Government as a pawn in their games, Kuma, who was made an example of what happens when you disobey the gods!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Reverie has begun! The representative kings and queens first discuss what to do with Straw Hat Luffy. Meanwhile the Revolutionary Army confirms its desire to save Kuma! All while they recount how the Straw Hats have grown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In order to recruit a strong ally towards bringing down Kaido, Cat Viper and his crew stop by Whitebeard's homeland to see Marco, the 1st division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others become excited as they see familiar faces in a newspaper article about the Reverie while they close in on the Land of Wano. But this dangerous and foreboding land is as inaccessible as it is mysterious! The sea itself is a barrier!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A mysterious country, a rampaging slasher, ancient samurai rituals of seppuku - and Zoro in the crosshairs! When a street assault occurs, all signs point to Zoro! Meanwhile, Luffy finally arrives at the Land of Wano.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Stranded alone on the beach, Luffy tries to gather his bearings only to be confronted by some mysterious, and dangerous, local fauna! And then, he meets a little girl named Otama! Meanwhile, Zoro makes trouble for the others who are trying to blend in!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Otama's gratitude towards Luffy knows no bounds! But the feast she cooks him exhausts her food stores completely! As she suffers from poor drinking water, her companion tells the story of the mysterious outsider she waits for - Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ambushed and outgunned by a skilled bounty hunter Cidre's group, the Straw Hats rely on the Sunny's Coup de Burst to escape! But they end up stranded without cola! A nearby soda island offers a solution.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Boa Hancock square off against the Cidre Guild! These unscrupulous bounty hunters have one thing in mind - profit at any cost! When the battle looks won, Cidre gears up in a menacing power suit!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Otama recounts her promise to Ace while Luffy rushes her to medical attention. But just as they reach the wasteland, a familiar face comes into view! But Kaido's underlings show up too!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Otama's temperature is going up and Luffy has no time to waste! However, Hawkins, one of Kaido's Headliners, blocks their way by showing his unique powers and skills which can harm his own men.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Zoro have been stalled by Hawkins but their fortune looks bright as they are guided by a woman who Zoro had saved. She leads them to a teahouse and to an herbal remedy for the river poison.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Otama's life is saved by Otsuru at her teahouse. The proud Otama finds it hard to take more kindness. The group learns of the Okobore Town - living on the cast-offs of the officials! Then, suddenly, they were attacked by the Shogun's men!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Otama has been kidnapped by the Gifters! She is taken to a flourishing town called Bakura Town where a creepy-looking Headliner was expecting her. Luffy and Zoro rush to rescue her along with a samurai, Okiku!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Luffy, Zoro, and Okiku bounce through Bakura Town on Komachiyo's back, a sumo wrestler comes flying towards them! Interested, they go down to watch sumo but the undefeated yokozuna Urashima has been expecting Okiku there.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy challenges Urashima, the strongest yokozuna in the Land of Wano, to a sumo match! Urashima even uses illegal moves to beat Luffy at any cost! Meanwhile, Holdem tells Otama that he knows she committed a crime and he has to punish her for it.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After sending the yokozuna Urashima flying, Luffy and his clan continue their search for Bakura Town's boss to save Otama! They finally find the boss, Holdem, one of the Beast Pirates' Headliners.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Facing Holdem who is holding Otama as hostage, Luffy prepares for a fight but Okiku tries to stop him by sharing who is really ruling the region. Meanwhile, Basil Hawkins is confronted by a mysterious figure.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Taking down Holdem, Luffy rescues Otama and tries to catch up to Zoro and Okiku who stole the food treasure ship and started a mad dash to get out of the town!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: This is a story of Luffy in an alternate reality. While sailing on the sea by himself, a strange bird crashes into his small boat. He looks up to find a giant ship where a girl named Ann has been captured. It seems like the bird belongs to her.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and the others dash out of BakuraTown on the treasure ship filled with food! Luffy catches up to them bringing ahuge bucket of fresh water! Then, they distribute the food and the water to thepeople of Okobore Town who were thirsty and hungry.

programme.title: Cat's Eye

programme.title: Cat's Eye
programme.desc: When Cat's Eye and Lupin's Bride target the same painting, the Kisugi sisters must go head to head with an international art thief who is not only more experienced than they are, but also may know something about their missing father.

programme.title: Cat's Eye
programme.desc: There's trouble in paradise when Toshio spoils a romantic moment with Hitomi worrying over Cat's Eye's next heist. Preoccupied with their fight and trying to work up the nerve to kiss Hitomi, catching Cat's isn't exactly the first thing on Toshio's mind.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep15
programme.desc: Catalina empieza con su cronograma de trabajo como prepago. Albeiro se encuentra en Bogotá con Octavio, se entera de muchas cosas de su novia. El guardaespaldas le cuenta a su patrón Marcial haberse enamorado de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep16
programme.desc: Catalina convence a su novio de estar juiciosa en la capital, los dos hacen el amor. Hilda se entera y cachetea a su hija. Catalina se ve con el Titi y lo golpea, el mafioso la manda a matar junto a Jessica. Las mujeres se refugian donde Marcial.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep17

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep18
programme.desc: Mauricio advierte a Catalina del peligro que posee si no le quita las prótesis. La gente del barrio ven el reinado, la mujer pelea con otra concursante, Catalina no gana. La mujer vuelve a su pueblo, se percata que Albeiro vive ahora con su madre

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep19

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep20
programme.desc: Catalina se entera de la muerte de su hermano por medio de la Diabla. Marcial se entera por medio de Pelambre que su mujer anda besándose con Albeiro, el hombre lo manda asesinar. Catalina descubre el romance de su novio y su mamá.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21
programme.desc: El Titi es capturado y extraditado por la DEA. A Catalina le extraen la prótesis por el dolor tan fuerte que estaba sufriendo. Jessica hace el amor con Marcial, le cuenta cosas malas de su amiga. Catalina es llevada a urgencias por Pelambre.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23
programme.desc: Catalina visita a su familia. La mujer se ve con Pelambre, se entera el romance de Marcial y Jessica. La mujer le pide al guardaespaldas matar a Jessica en un restaurante, sin embargo Catalina se hace pasar por ella y es asesinada en vez de la Diabla

programme.desc: While building a new Dog Park, Huck finds the Good Luck Charm that Cherry wrongly believes gives her the ability to sing difficult notes.

programme.desc: Leah and Jeremy's big day arrives, Chelsea celebrates her 21st birthday with friends, Jenelle shares her financial woes with her mom, and Kailyn gets a surprise from Javi and Isaac.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle's relationship with Kieffer worries her mom, Chelsea celebrates Aubree's birthday, Kailyn tells Jo about her plans with Javi, and Leah looks into Ali's developmental problems.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah brings Ali to a specialist, Kailyn and Javi marry before he leaves for basic training, Chelsea's first day back to school hits a snag, and Jenelle and her mom tangle over her drug use.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan y Gabriela son rescatados, él no esconde la alegría cuando ve a sus hermanos y finalmente se reencuentra con Norma, Gabriela está muy débil, es hospitalizada. Eva y Aníbal se reconocen.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela le pide perdón a sus hijas y a su padre, quiere un nuevo comienzo, a su salida del hospital, su familia le prepara una fiesta sorpresa. Franco y Sara se casan, finalmente reina la paz.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Bernardo Elizondo, un hacendado mayor y adinerado, se enamora de Libia, una joven humilde que enfrenta la furia de sus hermanos porque ella es vista como una prostituta por la gente del pueblo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan quiere marcharse lejos con sus hermanos para que Libia se olvide de ese amor, pero una verdad golpea el honor de la familia Reyes, mientras Bernardo esconde que es un hombre casado.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Al enterarse de la muerte y el engaño de Elizondo, Libia va a la hacienda, se siente desamparada y no aguanta más al ser fuertemente humillada por Gabriela, la viuda de Bernardo, y sus hijas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan, Óscar y Franco reconocen el cadáver de su hermana y acusan al hacendado como el asesino. Norma Elizondo se opone a las decisiones de su madre y desafía los deseos de su esposo Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes consiguen la dirección de la hacienda de los Elizondo y van a reclamar justicia. Gabriela se siente agobiada y toma vacaciones en su casa de la Florida, viaja con Norma y Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena y Sara Elizondo están cautivadas con los empleados que recibe Eva en la hacienda. Juan pelea con Franco por culpa de Rosario, la cantante del bar, y por oponerse a su venganza.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar propone una manera de desquitarse de los Elizondo sin mancharse las manos de sangre. Gabriela regresa sin avisar y entrevista a los trabajadores, Juan no puede ocultar su rabia y dolor.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan acepta seducir a las Elizondo, sus hermanos se preocupan por su actitud al conocer a Norma. Gabriela presiona a su hija para que comience a corresponderle a Fernando como esposa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena cita a Franco en un parque y se besan, él quiere ir más allá. Norma y Fernando celebran su primer aniversario de matrimonio en el bar, él se deslumbra con la presentación de Rosario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: La invitación a un rodeo en la hacienda es la ocasión perfecta para que Juan consiga la atención de Norma. Rosario termina con Franco para protegerlo y le prohíbe su entrada al bar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Encuentran a Franco malherido, Jimena sufre al enterarse de la gravedad de uno de los obreros. Norma habla a solas con Juan y le ofrece ayuda, él demuestra su soberbia y también su dignidad.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma atropella con su caballo a Juan y se siente culpable, se desatan los celos de Fernando. Franco es trasladado a un hospital, Gabriela le asegura a los Reyes que ella pagará los gastos.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a series first, 11 new teams of social media stars depart from their own homes all across the country and head for Mexico City, where they set off fireworks and dig deep at an archaeological Roadblock. .

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the Race travels to Colombia where Racers go mud-diving for emeralds in a volcano.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The race continues in Columbia, where claustrophobia could prevent a racer from going deep into the catacombs to retrieve their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A romance blossoms between two racers, and teams are caught in one of the largest-ever footraces to the mat for first place.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race reaches new heights as teams climb 15,000 feet in the French Alps, and one team may be in jeopardy of elimination after dropping their clue down a mountain.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history, teams travel to Yerevan, Armenia, where an express pass is on the line for the winner of the leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the country of Georgia where they learn how to make a traditional candy and go deep into the trenches at an old Georgian winery.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Dubai where they race camels and swim with sharks.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a tight race to the mat, teams row and swim to the Pit Stop located on a boat, where the losers walk the plank and are eliminated.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers embark on a gut wrenching, 40-foot plunge and teams make a difficult decision when faced with a double U-turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race for a spot in the finale and a high-stakes foot race to the mat will mark the end of one more team's journey.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As the final three teams race from Shenzhen, China to Santa Barbara, Calif. for the final leg of the Race, they face a gut-wrenching leap of faith.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a brand new twist, all 22 Racers are complete strangers who will meet on the starting line. Before "GO," Racers will immediately compete in a challenge that will determine the order for picking a Teammate, based on nothing but first impressions.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Sao Paulo, Brazil where tensions rise between two teams when one goes back on their word.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee stirs up a crusade for a chicken farmer whose property has been condemned to make way for a new road.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney adds a vintage motorcycle to the rolling stock of the Mayberry Sheriff's department, to the Sheriff's regret.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ernest T. Bass is a would-be Romeo, who is brought into the sheriff's home in an effort to teach him some manners.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A beautiful prisoner threatens to crumble the security of the Mayberry jail, as both Andy and Barney fall for her charms.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis Campbell acquires a car and threatens life and limb of Mayberry's pedestrian population.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney suffers an ego blow when Gomer out-sings him for a part in the Mayberry Choir. Andy Griffith's wife, Barbara, appears in this episode as a member of the singing group.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney disguises himself as a dummy in an attempt to solve a series of theft at the Mayberry department store.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes a week off, leaving Barney and Gomer in charge. A prisoner also takes off in the resultant confusion.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer falls asleep on the job and Andy douses a fire to save his life. Gomer becomes a menace trying to repay the favor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee saves money by buying a side of beef. The beef is tough, the freezer conks out, and Gomer attempts to fix the motor.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A strange mountain-style divorce ritual is frustrated by another ritual performed by Barney.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When Opie gets caught in a scheme to sell a useless product, Barney and Gomer come to his rescue.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Joyce Jameson and Jean Carson appear as two fun-loving blondes who upset the sheriff's office.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: British comedian Bernard Fox plays an Englishman who returns to Mayberry and upsets Aunt Bee with his efficiency.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney interprets a kiss as a sign of a secret engagement between Andy and Helen. The town gets the word and prepares a surprise party for the couple.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is furious when he sees his girl Thelma Lou kiss, Gomer.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes his son Opie and several of his pals on a camping trip. Barney and Gomer tag along to help out but only succeed in getting themselves lost in the woods.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer Pyle decides to join the Marine Corps and immediately falls afoul of his drill instructor Sergeant Carter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie Taylor develops a crush on his teacher, who also happens to be his father's girlfriend.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A campaign to fatten and stretch Barney Fife gets underway when it becomes apparent he doesn't match up to Civil Service physical requirements.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee invites relatives to Mayberry for a visit but they quickly wear out their welcome.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ernest T. Bass (Howard Morris) goes back to school when his girl demands it.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy has his misgivings when Aunt Bee's old beau shows up in Mayberry and tries to win her over again.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife buys a bloodhound to aid in Mayberry law enforcement.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney and Thelma Lou have a lovers' quarrel. Andy tries to help but only succeeds in getting caught in the middle.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney starts wearing his uniform all the time after being threatened with bodily harm if he's ever caught without it on.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie almost becomes $50 richer after finding a change purse.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Soft, serene and near silent, this Bob Ross painting is simple and elegant, with just a lone cabin nestled comfortably into pillows of snow.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Today's beautiful Bob Ross painting focuses on both an awesome cloudy sky, and a turbulent sea of crashing waves.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross on a painting excursion along this beautiful scenic river - who knows what abundance of nature's wealth lies beyond!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A lake and some tall trees pay homage to a commanding mountain in the background, as a cabin stands nearby -- a classic Bob Ross creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A cleverly constructed shape on canvas! Peek through the panes with artist Bob Ross and share a beautiful snowy day outside.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Follow guest artist Annette Kowalski as she creates a beautiful hanging clay pot full of leaves and flowers using the Bob Ross painting method.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Journey into the country with Bob Ross and watch how he creates this magnificent painting by adding a large old mill into the heart of the forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the salt spray as Bob Ross paints ocean waves under abundant clouds, rolling in to spend their energy against sand and rock.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Watch as the sun comes up into the golden sky and creates an illusion of the calm morning sea in this painting by guest artist Audrey Golden.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you to a beautiful lake in high country -- catch a glimpse of magnificent mountains, images echoed in the crystal clear water below.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross classic - the majestic snow-covered mountain, rolling foothills, leafy trees and bushes, and serene lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: An interesting way to frame two pictures! Bob Ross paints a mountain landscape from luscious summer to beautiful winter, both on one canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' dramatic use of blue tones results in an emotional depiction of stark waves at night - all tucked inside an oval shape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: The final embers of the day provide a spectacular palette of blazing colors in the sky.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A frozen pond and snow drifts would be so cold, except for the warm rich sky and late autumn foliage in this Bob Ross painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Painter Bob Ross invites you to enjoy the last of winter's snowy touch on canvas, as mountains and valleys begin to emerge from their slumber.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes us home to the farm -- a big red barn and a long rickety wooden fence - capturing our very vivid childhood memories.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A timid little brook winds its way through a golden grassland created by Bob Ross' precise, but easy-to-learn technique.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this one-of-a-kind masterpiece, Bob Ross paints a vibrant golden-red glow, complete with cowboy restin' a while by the cracklin' flames.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Gently rolling mountains make an amazing backdrop for this Bob Ross masterpiece; a winding stream and textured ground vegetation provide the rest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Supple sky, fluffy trees, and a playful rushing river are created by Bob Ross, simply from correcting common mistakes on canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Sneak away into the sounds of quiet waters, velvety green shrubs, and distant foothills. Bob Ross creates a perfect scene of relaxation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy the peacefulness of the calm evening as you take a walk with Bob Ross through the enchanted timberlands just before nightfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross transforms a zany looking canvas into a gorgeous, soft wooded scene with radiant sun glowing over opulent trees and bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Rich, soft colors prove that fall has arrived! Join Bob Ross as he paints a quiet pond and surrounding foliage preparing themselves for a season of slumber.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The trees have shed their snow and ice has begun to thaw, Spring will arrive soon in the incredibly beautiful Bob Ross landscape.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Happen upon this sweet cabin in the woods; Bob Ross paints a time-forgotten treasure that comes to life in a soft, warm landscape scene.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: A member of the Troika punishes a competitor for being verbally aggressive during the Inquisition and sends him off to the elimination, and new vendettas are formed leading up to the final.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: TJ reintroduces two Mercenaries with the power to launch a grenade if they win a card game against the final challengers, and a twist makes the final winner-take-all.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Britni and Marie face off for the first time after insulting each other online, Kam gets kudos for her three elimination round wins, and Bananas and Tony reflect on their Challenge baggage.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Never-before-seen footage of secret hookups starts rumors, Cara gets attacked for her attitude, and the winner of Vendettas is finally revealed.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seem–from slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds of the body of a murder victim, Lucas, his friend Artemus and Marshall Torrance begin a search for the killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When renegade Apaches wound Lucas and kidnap Mark, Marshall Torrance joins with U.S. Marshall Sam Buckhart to form a rescue posse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is the town's representative to the railroad commission until an infamous train robber dies and leaves his ill-gotten wealth to Lucas. Lucas must clear his name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a wealthy rancher is killed, Mark suggests that they seek the aid of a mind reader to identify the murderer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Eddie's daughter causes trouble for Lucas when two strangers threaten her life after she arrives with criminal information and stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Town character Brett Conway blackmails Lucas with the knowledge that a young couple Lucas rescued is suffering from yellow fever.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are stranded in the middle of a desert with very little food or water, and after Lucas is injured, Mark becomes the only hope for their survival.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trying to protect Banker Hamilton's gold, Mark is kidnapped and held hostage at the McCain ranch and will be killed within the hour unless Lucas cooperates.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas makes a life-or-death decision when Micah is held hostage and the kidnappers demand the release of a notorious outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to do a good deed for the old town drunk but it backfires when the drunk's son believes he inherited Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A dance hall singer asks Lucas to care for her daughter in an effort to hide the baby from her self-righteous, bigoted father.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes involved in a battle between an aspiring writer and a cocky, bragging trail boss.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous buffalo hunter tries to goad Lucas into a shooting match. When Lucas refuses, he becomes the new target.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it's Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is drawn to a young widow passing through town on her way to claim an inheritance but others who covet it are trying to kill her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After a young stablehand kills a notorious gunslinger, he is baffled by the hostility of the townspeople about giving him the reward.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to use trickery to obtain it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jeff Myrtlebank comes back to life at his own funeral and soon begins to act very strangely...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Kanamits, 9-foot tall aliens, arrive on Earth with one lofty goal: To Serve Man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Awakened by the cries of their daughter Bettina, Chris and Ruth Miller enter her room to find that she has vanished - even though they still hear her crying for help. Chris' physicist friend Bill thinks she moved into another dimension.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: David Gurney wakes up to find that no one - his wife, his co-workers, his best friend, not even his own mother knows him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut declares himself a god when his ship lands on a planet populated by people smaller than ants.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and his group make a risky run into Washington, D.C. to search for artifacts they will need to build the civilization he and Carl envisioned.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The communities join forces to restore a bridge that will facilitate communication and trade; someone is gravely injured at the construction site.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick's vision for the future is threatened by a mysterious disappearance that divides the work camp where the communities are building a bridge.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick's vision of a civilized future is threatened by a sudden reckoning with past sins that remain unavenged and unforgiven.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick is forced to face the past as he struggles to maintain the safety of the communities and protect the future he and Carl envisioned.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The survivors encounter unfamiliar faces outside the safety of their community's walls and must decide whether or not this new group can be trusted.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol seeks out an old friend living alone in a wilderness teeming with walkers; survivors make the perilous trek to a new home.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A small rescue mission braves a dangerous herd in their hunt for a missing comrade, only to discover a surprising threat that could doom them all.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The communities thought they could build a better future separately, but the recent loss of one of their own drives them to band together; new leaders rise when a disturbing and dangerous threat is unmasked; an escaped captive revisits his past.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A new arrival at the Hilltop opens up about the leader of a group of mask-wearing savages; a search party sets out on a daring mission to find two missing friends.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The savage group led by Alpha confronts the Hilltop in a harrowing attempt to retrieve her daughter; a supply run for the Kingdom turns into a dangerous quest.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While one community struggles to ease tensions that threaten to divide from within, the true nature of another group comes into focus; a mission to rescue a friend has deadly consequences.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl's daring rescue mission forces Alpha to unleash a group of her own to retrieve what belongs to her, even if the price is paid in blood; the Kingdom's plans to reunite the communities are put in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: An outsider's arrival forces Alexandria to rehash devastating old wounds; eye-opening secrets from the past are revealed.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The fair at the Kingdom is underway, with all four communities coming together in celebration for the first time in years; while some pacts are renewed, other deals will come at a much steeper price.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan y sus hombres atacan a las tres comunidades rebeldes al mismo tiempo. Sin Rick, Carl asume la defensa de Alexandria, cercada por el propio Negan. Mientras, Simon detiene al ejército de Hilltop en la carretera y Gavin quiere capturar a Ezekiel.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carl hace una última petición a Rick y Michonne antes de morir. Mientras tanto, Morgan y Carol intentan rescatar a Ezekiel antes de que Gavin se lo entregue vivo a Negan para que este lo torture y asesine delante de sus seguidores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan ordena a Simon que mate solo a uno de los hombres de Jadis como escarmiento, pero Simon tiene sed de venganza. Mientras, Rick se dirige al basurero del grupo de Jadis para renovar su alianza, y Aaron sigue intentando obtener un acuerdo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A Maggie se le acaban las reservas de alimentos y debe decidir si deja que los presos pasen hambre. Mientras, Daryl guía a los supervivientes de Alexandria a través de un pantano repleto de zombis, y la adversidad pone a prueba la fe de Gabriel.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick ataca a Negan cuando este se dirigía a Hilltop y terminan enfrentándose en un edificio abandonado, pero Simon y Dwight siguen el rastro de Negan. Mientras tanto, Maggie, Enid, Michonne y Rosita discuten sobre la propuesta de una desconocida.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Saviors, ahora dirigidos por Simon, atacan Hilltop pese a que algunos de sus combatientes están dentro, presos. Maggie organiza la defensa del poblado pero, ¿podrán evitar una masacre como la que Simon perpetró contra el grupo de Jadis?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Jadis planea una muerte horrenda para Negan. Mientras, Morgan va en busca de Henry y Rick sale de Hilltop para cazar a los que huyeron durante el asalto comandado por Simon. Finalmente, los dos se encuentran en territorio enemigo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras los hombres de Negan continúan con su ofensiva, Aaron sigue buscando aliados nuevos, pese a que pueda costarle la vida. Daryl y Rosita se enfrentan a un viejo amigo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las comunidades unen sus fuerzas en la última batalla contra los Salvadores. Negan ha conseguido entregar a Rick un mapa con instrucciones mapas, para así tenderle una emboscada.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y su grupo hacen un viaje arriesgado a Washington, D. C. para buscar los artefactos que necesitarán para construir la civilización que él y Carl imaginaron.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las comunidades se unen para restaurar un puente que facilite la comunicación y el comercio, pero alguien resulta gravemente herido. Además, varios Saviors han desaparecido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una desaparición misteriosa pone en peligro los planes para el futuro de Rick y divide al grupo mientras construyen un puente.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La visión de Rick de un futuro civilizado se ve amenazada por un cúmulo de traiciones y agravios pasados que nunca fueron vengados ni perdonados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick se ve obligado a enfrentar el pasado en su intento por proteger a las comunidades y el futuro que Carl y él concibieron.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather Jr vs Justin Juuko
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 1999 Floyd Mayweather fought Justin Juuko at the Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for the WBC World Super featherweight title with the bout ending in round nine resulting in a victory for Mayweather

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: On June 25th, 2005 Floyd Mayweather fought Arturo Gatti at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Super Lightweight title with Gatti down in round 1 the fight ended in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Carlos Alberto Ramon Rios
programme.desc: On February 17th, 1999, Floyd Mayweather fought Carlos Rios for the WBC Super Featherweight Title in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Rios was a tough opponent for Mayweather, but Mayweather prevailed and showed out in front of his hometown, winning by UD.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs DeMarcus Corley
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 2004 Floyd Mayweather fought DeMarcus Corley at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Light Welterweight Title eliminator with Corely going down in round 8 and round 10 resulting in a win for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Diego Corrales
programme.desc: On January 20th, 2001 Floyd Mayweather faced Diego Corrales in a battle for the WBC World super feather weight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas ending in a technical knockout victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Hector Arroyo
programme.desc: On January 9th, 1998, Floyd Mayweather fought Hector Arroyo in a featherweight bout in Biloxi, Mississippi. A young Mayweather hungry for a title shot came out quick against Arroyo, stopping him in the fifth round of the fight.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Larry O'Shields
programme.desc: On June 14th, 1997, Floyd Mayweather fought Larry O'Shields in a lightweight bout at the Alamodome in San Antonio, Texas. A young Mayweather showed his impressive speed and agility, earning a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Manny Pacquiao
programme.desc: On May 2nd, 2015, Floyd Mayweather fought Manny Pacquiao in what was labeled as the "Fight of the Century." Floyd Mayweather emerged victorious via a unanimous decision, showcasing his exceptional defensive skills against Pacquiao's aggressive style.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Phillip N'dou
programme.desc: On November 1st, 2003 Floyd Mayweather and Phillip N'dou fought eachother for the WBC world lightweight title at the Van Andel Arena in Grand Rapids with Mayweather ending the bout early for a technical knockout victory

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On April 8th, 2006, Floyd Mayweather fought Zab Judah for the IBF and IBO Welterweight Titles at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. In a fight with a dramatic melee in round 10, Mayweather cruised in the later rounds to win by unanimous decision.

programme.title: Freddie Roach vs Joe Ruelaz
programme.desc: On August 9th, 1984, Freddie Roach fought Joe Ruelaz in a super featherweight bout in Las Vegas. The more experienced Roach made easy work of Ruelaz, stopping him in the fourth round.

programme.title: Freddie Roach vs Mario Chavez
programme.desc: On May 28th, 1981 Freddie Roach faced Mario Chavez at the Hacienda Hotel in Las Vegas resulting in a unanimous decision win for Roach.

programme.title: Genaro Hernandez vs Azumah Nelson
programme.desc: On March 22nd, 1997, Genaro Hernandez fought Azumah Nelson for the World Super Featherweight Championship at the Memorial Coliseum in Corpus Christi. Hernandez looked like the more confident fighter, earning a close split decision victory.

programme.title: George Foreman vs Adilson Rodrigues
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1990 George Foreman fought Adilson Rodrigues at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a victory for Foreman in round two by technical knockout.

programme.title: George Foreman vs Alex Stewart
programme.desc: On April 11th, 1992 George Foreman faced Alex Stewart at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas ending in a majority decision victory for Foreman.

programme.title: George Foreman vs Gerry Cooney
programme.desc: On January 15th, 1990 George Foreman and Gerry Cooney fought at the Reno-Sparks Convention Center in Reno, Las Vegas ending in a majority decision victory for Foreman.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The Ice Road takes no prisoners when the truckers push their limits. Ray spins out into oncoming big rigs. Jack battles a 200-ton monster haul to Prudhoe.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Ax Men
